overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit covered promenade, ascending stairs to an elevated overlook of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape with massive digital billboards, then descending back to street level. The environment features teal and pink neon lighting, reflective surfaces, and towering glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered luxury shopping promenade with neon accents

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit covered corridor with reflective floors, passing illuminated advertisements

entered.detail: covered pedestrian walkway with teal neon trim and reflective marble flooring
large illuminated advertisement showing figures with tennis rackets and FERUID branding
large potted palm trees in white rectangular planters
transparent glass barriers with metal frames along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered luxury promenade with reflective marble floors and teal neon lighting. Large digital advertisements and potted palm trees line the walkway as a few pedestrians appear in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior staircase ascending between commercial buildings

events.description: turns right from covered corridor toward exterior staircase
emerges from covered area into open air with ambient city lights becoming visible

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide exterior stairs between glass buildings, transitioning from enclosed corridor to open city view

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with glass railings ascending between futuristic buildings
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Turning from the corridor to ascend a wide exterior staircase between glass skyscrapers. The covered walkway falls behind as the city skyline becomes visible, with the FERUID billboard now appearing on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian overlook with panoramic city views

events.description: reaches top of stairs and emerges onto elevated overlook platform
pans right to view large pink digital billboard and surrounding cityscape
pans left across the urban canyon showing traffic on streets below

agents.ego_description: walking along the overlook platform and panning camera to take in the cyberpunk cityscape and massive digital billboards

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian terrace with marble flooring overlooking the city street below
massive curved digital screen displaying woman with pink hair and CHOOH2 energy drink advertisements
large illuminated sign reading 'SECHO' on building facade
multi-lane road with moving traffic visible from elevated perspective

segments.scene_description: Standing on an elevated overlook platform overlooking the cyberpunk cityscape. Massive digital billboards display pink neon advertisements while the camera pans across the urban canyon, showing traffic moving on the streets below and the illuminated SECHO building.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending exterior staircase toward street intersection

events.description: begins descending stairs toward street level
passes NPC ascending stairs, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking down the exterior staircase toward street level where pedestrians and traffic are visible

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in dark clothing ascending the stairs as ego descends

entered.detail: same staircase structure now being descended toward street level
street corner with crosswalk markings and traffic lights visible at bottom of stairs
plain beige building wall with horizontal lines alongside the staircase

segments.scene_description: Descending the exterior staircase toward street level, passing a pedestrian coming up. The concrete wall of the building lines the left side as the street intersection with crosswalks and traffic lights comes into view at the bottom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered luxury corridor up to a panoramic city overlook and back down to the bustling street level. It begins by gliding through a covered promenade with reflective marble floors and teal neon lighting, passing digital advertisements and potted palms. As the camera turns and ascends a wide exterior staircase, the enclosed walkway falls away to reveal a towering skyline dominated by the FERUID billboard. The scene then expands upon reaching an elevated platform, where the camera pans across an urban canyon of pink neon advertisements, the illuminated SECHO building, and flowing traffic below. Finally, the perspective descends the concrete stairs, passing a pedestrian before arriving at a street intersection marked by crosswalks and traffic lights.
